paragraphs.title: ResultUDF Object
Aggregator (ungrouped)
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.{Encoder, Encoders, SparkSession}
import org.apache.spark.sql.expressions.Aggregator
import spark.implicits._
import org.apache.spark.sql.Dataset
import scala.math.BigDecimal

object IndexRowsSum extends Aggregator[s12Re, indexSum, String] {

  def zero: indexSum = indexSum("0", "0")
  
  def reduce(buffer: indexSum, s3TR: s12Re): indexSum = {
    val red1= BigDecimal(buffer.iSum)+BigDecimal(s3TR.result)
    val red2=buffer.finalISum  
    indexSum(red1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,red2)
  }
  
  def merge(b1: indexSum, b2: indexSum): indexSum = {
    val mer1=BigDecimal(b1.iSum)+BigDecimal(b2.iSum)
    val mer2=b1.finalISum
    indexSum(mer1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,mer2)
  }
 
  def finish(reduction: indexSum): String = reduction.iSum

  def bufferEncoder: Encoder[indexSum] = Encoders.product

  def outputEncoder: Encoder[String] = Encoders.STRING
}

val ds= z.get("rUdf0710000").asInstanceOf[Dataset[s12Re]]
ds.schema
ds.show(false) 

val indexResult = IndexRowsSum.toColumn.name("index_Result")
val iResult = ds.select(indexResult)
iResult.show(false)

paragraphs.title: Unpack Grouped DataFrame
RowScalar,Degree pivot.
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.DataFrame
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType
val df= z.get("KvDSUnpavked").asInstanceOf[DataFrame]
df.show
val groupDf = df.withColumn("rowScalar",col("_1").cast(DecimalType(25,10)))
                .withColumn("degree",col("_2").cast(DecimalType(25,10)))
                .withColumn("scalar",col("scalar_Result").cast(DecimalType(25,10)))
//                .orderBy(asc("nBD"),asc("rowCounterBD"))
                .groupBy("rowScalar")
                .pivot("degree")
                .agg(sum("scalar"))
val groupDfCount = groupDf.count()
groupDf.show(groupDfCount.toInt,false)
groupDf.schema
z.put("pivotDF",groupDf)
